title: Opal+
description: A modpack made to give you the best FPS while running smooth and shiny like an opal (with a few fun mods)
body:
# Opal+ Overview

## Performance

Opal+ Has multiple performance measures that ensures only the highest FPS for your gameplay in PVP servers, never costing you a frame. This also makes the pack amazing for recording and playing on your favorite servers.

Multiple mods and addons have been added that are soley added for performance reasons and gameplay reasons to make every part of your experience shine.

## Usage

Opal+ is mainly utility and extra game addons that are cosmetic to you and boosts performance on high-player servers. This pack is aimed mainly at multiplayer minigames servers, especially Hypixel as they are one of they only high-traffick minigames servers still around and functioning with an active playerbase. While this can be technically used for singleplayer, survival, and other parts of the game. It is strongly recommended to be used in high-population minigames servers and if you ask for support on singleplayer or survival-like servers, you will not be answered.
